goals.title: Execute the approved Prometheus plan at .omo/plans/healthdog-website-...
goals.objective: Execute the approved Prometheus plan at .omo/plans/healthdog-website-build.md end-to-end. Use the Prometheus plan checkboxes as the authoritative task breakdown; verify with automated commands, real browser/manual QA evidence, independent review, cleanup receipts, atomic commits, and the already requested GitHub push when complete.

successCriteria.scenario: Browser happy path: after all Prometheus checkboxes complete, start python3 -m http.server 8790 --directory pet-clone-site, open http://127.0.0.1:8790/index.html in the in-app browser, capture desktop and mobile screenshots; PASS iff first viewport clearly presents 헬스독, phone 1600-4533, real pet imagery, branch CTA, and no broken major layout.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/task-9-desktop-fullpage.png + .omo/evidence/task-9-mobile-fullpage.png + .omo/evidence/task-9-visual-qa.md with cleanup receipt for server/browser state

successCriteria.scenario: Regression and guardrail commands: run node --test pet-clone-site/tests/site-structure.test.mjs, rg required Health Dog strings, and rg forbidden BB PUPPY/secret/commerce/unconfirmed medical-claim strings; PASS iff tests pass, required data is present, forbidden strings are absent or documented as source-only false positives in evidence.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/task-11-final-commands.txt + .omo/evidence/final-scope-fidelity.txt with exact command outputs and cleanup receipt

successCriteria.scenario: Final review and git delivery: independent reviewer audits final diff/evidence, debugging hypotheses are checked, git status is clean except intentional state, and the verified commit is pushed to origin/main as previously requested; PASS iff reviewer approval, push result, and commit hash are recorded.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/019eb65e-5875-75f0-8855-403d984a4410/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/019eb65e-5875-75f0-8855-403d984a4410/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
